## Qaid v0.3.0 — Liquid Glass + correctness foundations

Two-track release: a design-language pass (Liquid Glass + iPhone SE fit-without-scroll polish) and a correctness/test-infra foundation that makes the React rewrite ship-stable. Sets up Trix mode work next.

### Design + UX

- **Liquid Glass** ([2ab6fee](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/2ab6fee)) — iOS 26-style translucent surfaces with backdrop blur and refractive edges across cards, sheets, and the home hero.
- **Sebeeta numpad −10 shortcut** ([fc470b5](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/fc470b5)) — replaces ⌫ with a `−10` key in the score-entry numpad. The bonus move that pushes a player away from the threshold is now one tap, not three.
- **Home cards art-on-end** ([0f6039c](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/0f6039c)) — game-mode cards reshuffled so the SVG fans anchor the trailing edge; numpad `−10` styled red for visual weight.
- **iPhone SE refit** ([a42b2ef](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/a42b2ef), [277ca2b](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/277ca2b), [1114db3](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/1114db3)) — Home and Play fit 375×667 with zero overflow. Setup screen reclaims dead space: natural-flow CTA (drops the sticky bottom button), chips + Roster restored. Play tiles shrink to content so the 6-player layout fits.
- **Sebeeta section labels** ([2623ced](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/2623ced)) — "Target" and "Total Score" eyebrows above each section on Play; larger tiles overall.
- **Hint cleanup** ([3291b31](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/3291b31)) — drop the "partners sit across" copy and the vs divider on Setup. Less ceremony.
- **RoundSheet input alignment + full names in History** ([a963ec8](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/a963ec8)) — RTL `margin-inline-start: auto` was mis-resolving inside a `direction: ltr` button; History over-eagerly first-word-truncated names. Now 2-line wrap with matching `min-height` so values stay co-aligned.
- **App-native ConfirmSheet** ([9d65ab7](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/9d65ab7)) — replaces all 5 `window.confirm` callsites (Reset, ClearPlayers, DeleteRound, ClearRecents, ClearProfiles) with a Liquid-Glass sheet that matches the rest of the UI. Callback-API hook `useConfirm()` modelled on the Toast pattern.

### Correctness

- **Symmetric reverse log on finished-game undo/edit** ([bfb7909](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/bfb7909)) — `applyScoresUpdate` was forward-only. Undoing or editing the final round of a logged game left `gameLogged`, the orphan `recentGames[0]` entry, profile counters, and the Winner screen all stale. New pure `reverseGameLog` + `revertProfiles` helpers run before the forward phase. Navigation rules: fresh win → Winner; re-log from History → preserve screen (no yank); un-win on Winner → bounce to Play.
- **localStorage payload sanitization** ([f95ae71](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/f95ae71)) — `loadState()` used to spread-merge raw JSON into defaults; an invalid enum or non-array could leak through. New pure `sanitizeState(raw)` validates every field, drops bad entries, caps `recentGames` at 10, and drops nameless profiles. Storage key `cardScoreTracker_v1` unchanged — legacy installs upgrade silently.

### Test infrastructure

The React rewrite now has a real integration suite. Added `@testing-library/react@^16.3.2` and a shared `src/test/harness.tsx` that mirrors `App.tsx`'s provider stack.

| Layer | Cases | Coverage |
|---|---|---|
| Engine + pure helpers | 65 | `scoring`, `profiles`, `gameLog`, `persistedState` |
| State machine | 9 | `GameContext` (forward + reverse-log) |
| Screens | 29 | Setup, Play, Winner, History, Home |
| Components | 16 | ConfirmSheet (7), RoundSheet (9 — Kout contract/manual + Sebeeta/Custom numpad/PM) |
| App-level | 4 | screen-transition direction |
| IO | 2 | `shareGameImage` fallback paths (mocked canvas + navigator.share) |
| **Total** | **134** | 14 test files |

### State shape

No breaking changes. The localStorage key + shape are unchanged. `sanitizeState` now runs on load — older installs with valid state continue to upgrade silently; corrupted state cleanly resets to defaults instead of crashing.

### Verification

- `npm run typecheck` clean
- `npm test` 134/134 passing
- `npm run build` 302 KB Workbox precache (17 entries)
- `vitest`'s jsdom environment exercises the full provider stack on every screen test
